description: The 'Ndrina Barbaro is a powerful 'ndrina (organized crime family) of the 'Ndrangheta, originating from Platì, Calabria, Italy. Founded in the late 19th century, it is one of the oldest still-active 'ndrine. The family has multiple branches and is heavily involved in drug trafficking and arms possession. It has expanded its operations across northern Italy and into Australia, particularly in Melbourne and Griffith.

country_links.evidence_quote: In Australia sono alleati con i Sergi , e si sono insediati a Melbourne e Griffith fin dagli anni settanta del secolo scorso.
country_links.context: The Barbaro clan has settled in Melbourne and Griffith since the 1970s, cultivating and trafficking marijuana.

country_links.evidence_quote: Nell'operazione sono state arrestate 21 persone di cui alcune anche in Belgio , Paesi Bassi , Germania ed Italia .
country_links.context: The Barbaro clan was involved in a large ecstasy trafficking operation that led to arrests in Belgium.
The Barbaro clan sourced drugs from Brazil via the Assisi clan.

country_links.evidence_quote: Il 23 gennaio 2018 si conclude un'operazione della Guardia di Finanza cominciata nel 2013 che blocca un traffico di droga tra la Colombia e i paesi di Corsico , Assago , Buccinasco e Trezzano sul Naviglio riconducibile ai Barbaro- Papalia .
country_links.context: The Barbaro clan was involved in a drug trafficking route from Colombia to Italy.

country_links.evidence_quote: Viene arrestato ad Arzon in Francia il 5 settembre 2019 .
country_links.context: A member of the 'Ndrina Barbaro was arrested in France after fleeing there.

country_links.evidence_quote: Nell'operazione sono state arrestate 21 persone di cui alcune anche in Belgio , Paesi Bassi , Germania ed Italia .
country_links.context: The Barbaro clan was involved in a large ecstasy trafficking operation that led to arrests in Germany.

country_links.evidence_quote: Nell'operazione sono state arrestate 21 persone di cui alcune anche in Belgio , Paesi Bassi , Germania ed Italia .
country_links.context: The Barbaro clan was involved in a large ecstasy trafficking operation that led to arrests in the Netherlands.

country_links.evidence_quote: Sono accusati a vario titolo di traffico internazionale di droga attraverso la Spagna e approvvigionandosi in Brasile dagli Assisi
country_links.context: The Barbaro clan trafficked drugs internationally through Spain.

country_links.evidence_quote: La droga veniva dal Venezuela , passava dall' Africa e arrivava in Europa .
country_links.context: The Barbaro clan sourced cocaine from Venezuela, which was trafficked to Europe.
